title: AI-Powered Mental Health Chatbot
description: A conversational AI chatbot that uses NLP and sentiment analysis to provide mental health support and counseling resources to students. Features include mood tracking, crisis detection, and therapist referral system.

title: Smart Waste Management System
description: IoT-based waste management platform using sensors in bins to monitor fill levels, optimize collection routes, and reduce operational costs for municipalities.

title: Blockchain-based Academic Credential Verification
description: Decentralized platform for verifying academic degrees and certificates using blockchain technology. Eliminates credential fraud and simplifies verification for employers.

title: Real-time Sign Language Translator
description: Computer vision application that translates sign language gestures to text and speech in real-time using deep learning models trained on ASL datasets.

title: Crop Disease Detection Mobile App
description: Mobile application for farmers that uses camera-based plant disease detection powered by CNN models. Provides treatment recommendations and connects to agricultural experts.

title: Personalized Learning Path Generator
description: AI-powered e-learning platform that creates personalized study plans based on student performance, learning style, and career goals. Uses adaptive testing and knowledge graph.

title: Decentralized Voting Platform
description: Secure online voting system using blockchain for transparent and tamper-proof elections. Features include voter identity verification, encrypted ballots, and public audit trail.

title: Traffic Flow Prediction System
description: Machine learning system that predicts traffic congestion patterns using historical data, weather, and event information. Provides real-time routing recommendations.

title: Women Safety Mobile App
description: Emergency safety app with real-time location sharing, SOS alerts, fake call generator, and safe route suggestions. Includes community safety mapping.

title: AI Resume Screener and Ranker
description: NLP-based system that automatically screens resumes, extracts key information, and ranks candidates based on job requirements using semantic matching.

title: Smart Parking Management System
description: IoT-based parking solution using ultrasonic sensors to detect available spots, mobile app for reservation, and dynamic pricing based on demand.

title: Fake News Detection Platform
description: AI platform that identifies misinformation and fake news using NLP, fact-checking databases, and credibility scoring of news sources.

title: Student Expense Tracker with Budget Prediction
description: Mobile app for students to track daily expenses, categorize spending, and get AI-powered budget predictions and savings recommendations.

title: Hospital Bed Availability Tracker
description: Real-time dashboard showing hospital bed availability, ICU capacity, and oxygen supply levels across city hospitals. Helps patients find available beds during emergencies.

title: AR-based Interior Design Visualizer
description: Augmented reality app that lets users visualize furniture and decor in their rooms before purchase. Features include 3D model placement, color matching, and e-commerce integration.

title: Automated Code Review Tool
description: AI-powered code review platform that detects bugs, security vulnerabilities, and code quality issues. Provides actionable fix suggestions using LLM-based analysis.

title: Carbon Footprint Calculator
description: Web application that calculates individual and organizational carbon footprint based on daily activities, transportation, diet, and energy usage. Suggests reduction strategies.

title: Peer-to-Peer Study Group Matching
description: Platform that matches students for study groups based on courses, learning goals, availability, and complementary strengths using collaborative filtering.

title: Food Donation and Distribution Network
description: Platform connecting restaurants and events with surplus food to food banks and shelters. Features route optimization for pickup and delivery, expiry tracking.

title: Earthquake Early Warning System
description: IoT sensor network for detecting seismic activity and sending early warnings to residents via mobile push notifications. Uses machine learning for pattern recognition.

title: Online Exam Proctoring System
description: AI-based exam proctoring that detects cheating through face recognition, eye tracking, audio analysis, and screen monitoring during online examinations.

title: Smart Energy Monitoring Dashboard
description: Real-time energy consumption monitoring for buildings using IoT sensors. Provides analytics, anomaly detection, and automated energy-saving recommendations.

title: Medical Image Analysis for Tumor Detection
description: Deep learning model for detecting and classifying tumors in medical images (X-ray, MRI, CT scans). Assists radiologists with automated screening.

title: Freelancer Project Management Platform
description: All-in-one platform for freelancers to manage projects, track time, generate invoices, communicate with clients, and manage contracts.

title: Sentiment Analysis Dashboard for Social Media
description: Real-time sentiment analysis tool that monitors brand mentions across social media platforms. Provides trend visualization, alert system, and competitor comparison.

title: Autonomous Drone for Agricultural Spraying
description: Drone-based precision agriculture system that autonomously identifies crop areas needing treatment and performs targeted pesticide spraying.

title: Recipe Generator from Available Ingredients
description: AI-powered cooking assistant that suggests recipes based on available ingredients, dietary preferences, and nutritional goals. Uses image recognition for ingredient identification.

title: Automatic Attendance System using Face Recognition
description: Classroom attendance management system using face recognition to automatically mark student attendance. Includes analytics dashboard for attendance patterns.

title: NFT Marketplace for Digital Art
description: Platform for artists to mint, showcase, and sell digital art as NFTs. Features include auction system, royalty management, and social features for artist community.

title: Personal Finance Advisor Chatbot
description: AI chatbot providing personalized financial advice, investment recommendations, and expense analysis based on user financial data and goals.

title: Document Summarization Tool
description: NLP tool that automatically generates concise summaries of long documents, research papers, and legal texts using transformer-based models.

title: Blood Bank Management System
description: Web platform for managing blood donation and distribution across hospitals. Features include donor matching, inventory management, and emergency request broadcasting.

title: Smart Irrigation System
description: IoT-based automated irrigation system that monitors soil moisture, weather forecasts, and crop requirements to optimize water usage in farming.

title: Music Recommendation Engine
description: Hybrid recommendation system that combines collaborative filtering and content-based analysis of audio features to suggest personalized playlists.

title: Virtual Lab Simulation Platform
description: Interactive web-based platform for conducting virtual physics, chemistry, and biology experiments. Features 3D simulations, data collection, and lab report generation.

title: Employee Wellness and Burnout Tracker
description: HR analytics platform that tracks employee wellness indicators, predicts burnout risk, and suggests interventions based on work patterns and survey data.

title: Multi-Language Chat Translation App
description: Real-time chat application with automatic translation between 50+ languages using neural machine translation. Supports text, voice, and image translation.

title: Pothole Detection and Reporting System
description: Mobile app that uses accelerometer data and computer vision to detect potholes while driving. Automatically reports issues to municipal authorities with GPS coordinates.

title: Supply Chain Transparency Platform
description: Blockchain-based supply chain tracking system that provides end-to-end visibility of product journey from manufacturer to consumer. Includes QR code verification.

title: Elderly Care Monitoring System
description: Wearable IoT device with companion app for monitoring elderly vital signs, fall detection, medication reminders, and emergency alerts to family members.

title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine
description: Hybrid recommendation system for e-commerce using collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, and deep learning to suggest products based on browsing and purchase history.

title: Disaster Response Coordination Platform
description: Platform for coordinating disaster relief efforts including volunteer management, resource allocation, real-time communication, and affected area mapping.

title: Handwritten Text Digitization Tool
description: OCR-based tool specifically trained for handwritten text recognition in regional languages. Converts handwritten notes to editable digital text.

title: Gym Workout Planner with Pose Estimation
description: Fitness app that uses computer vision for real-time exercise pose estimation, form correction, rep counting, and personalized workout plan generation.

title: Legal Document Analysis Platform
description: NLP-powered platform for analyzing legal contracts, identifying risks, extracting key clauses, and comparing similar contracts using semantic search.

title: Campus Event Management Platform
description: End-to-end event management system for college campuses. Features include event creation, ticketing, attendance tracking, feedback collection, and analytics.

title: Air Quality Index Monitoring Network
description: Distributed network of IoT air quality sensors providing real-time AQI data, health advisories, and pollution source tracking for urban areas.

title: Online Skill Assessment and Certification
description: Platform for creating, taking, and verifying skill assessments with blockchain-verified certificates. Includes adaptive testing and proctoring.

title: Predictive Maintenance for Industrial Equipment
description: ML-based system for predicting equipment failures using sensor data analysis. Reduces downtime and maintenance costs through early anomaly detection.

title: Mental Wellness Journal with AI Insights
description: Daily journaling app that uses sentiment analysis and NLP to track emotional patterns, provide mood insights, and suggest wellness activities.
